chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1463 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 07-10-2025 Mr. Asif Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioners. **** Learned counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, does not press the instant petition and submits that separate petitions will be filed after obtaining Disability Assessment Certificates of the petitioners, except petitioner No.2, by appearing before the Medical Assessment Board constituted under the Sindh Persons with Disabilities Protection Authority, Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, Government of Sindh. Order accordingly. Accordingly, instant petition along with pending application(s) is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
